    Trade Bobo On

    ABOUT US

    Bobo the Bear is a meme character associated with bear markets. The design of Bobo is based on Apu Apustaja, and sometimes Pepe the Frog. The name “Bobo“ was chosen in June 2018, and has become the official name for the character. Bobo is posted worldwide on Twitter, 4chan, but particularly on the /biz board (4chan). Bobo NFTs (Bobo Council) have been created. Bobo is used to satirize poor investment choices, and express pessimism in financial markets. Bobo is run by “rekt_teka$hi“ an OG Bobo Meme artist, who has been creating Bobo content since its inception in 2018.

        Frequently Asked

        Questions

        What‘s so special about Bobo the Bear?

        Bobo the Bear is great liberator of the financial markets. When times get rough, Bobo shines the brightest. Bobo memes make us laugh in the darkest of times.

        How long has Bobo been around?

        Lore dates back to 2018. Names like “Bernard“ were thrown around until the 4chan community finally decided on the name Bobo. Bobo is a derivative of Pepe the Frog with bear features. Drawn by community members around the world. Our dev was secretly responsible for a large portion of Bobo content.

        Wen Moon?

        Soon.
